layers.free_translation: O Isis, the god; Peksemelde, man; the high official the offspring the good; bread(s) and water(s) — may it be given.

layers.free_translation: O Isis, O god!; Mntemnoye, good woman, O offspring!; bread(s) and water(s) — may it be given.
